title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud presented a hands-on demo of Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Agent2Agent protocol (A2A) for multi-agent collaboration. The demo showed distinct AI agents working together on game architecture, asset rendering, and project management with human-in-the-loop oversight on Cloud Run.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through a hands-on demo of the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent protocol (A2A), showing how multiple AI agents coordinate to design a game. The demo splits work across distinct agents handling game architecture, asset rendering, and project management, with human-in-the-loop oversight and deployment on Cloud Run. It illustrates how ADK and A2A combine to structure agent specialization and inter-agent communication in a single workflow.
